root_text.sn25.2:1.8: Yo, bhikkhave, ime dhamme evaṁ saddahati adhimuccati, ayaṁ vuccati saddhānusārī, okkanto sammattaniyāmaṁ, sappurisabhūmiṁ okkanto, vītivatto puthujjanabhūmiṁ;
root_text.sn25.2:1.9: abhabbo taṁ kammaṁ kātuṁ, yaṁ kammaṁ katvā nirayaṁ vā tiracchānayoniṁ vā pettivisayaṁ vā upapajjeyya;
root_text.sn25.2:1.10: abhabbo ca tāva kālaṁ kātuṁ yāva na sotāpattiphalaṁ sacchikaroti.
root_text.sn25.2:2.1: Yassa kho, bhikkhave, ime dhammā evaṁ paññāya mattaso nijjhānaṁ khamanti, ayaṁ vuccati: ‘dhammānusārī, okkanto sammattaniyāmaṁ, sappurisabhūmiṁ okkanto, vītivatto puthujjanabhūmiṁ;
root_text.sn25.2:2.2: abhabbo taṁ kammaṁ kātuṁ, yaṁ kammaṁ katvā nirayaṁ vā tiracchānayoniṁ vā pettivisayaṁ vā upapajjeyya;
root_text.sn25.2:2.3: abhabbo ca tāva kālaṁ kātuṁ yāva na sotāpattiphalaṁ sacchikaroti’.
root_text.sn25.2:2.4: Yo, bhikkhave, ime dhamme evaṁ pajānāti evaṁ passati, ayaṁ vuccati:

translation_text.sn25.2:1.2: “Mendicants, sights are impermanent, decaying, and perishing.
translation_text.sn25.2:1.7: and ideas are impermanent, decaying, and perishing.
translation_text.sn25.2:1.8: Someone who has faith and confidence in these teachings is called a follower by faith. They’ve stepped into the sure path, they’ve stepped into the level of the true person, and they’ve passed beyond the level of the untrue person.
translation_text.sn25.2:1.9: They can’t do any deed which would make them be reborn in hell, the animal realm, or the ghost realm.
translation_text.sn25.2:1.10: They can’t die without realizing the fruit of stream-entry.
translation_text.sn25.2:2.1: Someone who accepts these teachings after deliberating them with a degree of wisdom is called a follower of teachings. They’ve stepped into the sure path, they’ve stepped into the level of the true person, and they’ve passed beyond the level of the untrue person.
translation_text.sn25.2:2.2: They can’t do any deed which would make them be reborn in hell, the animal realm, or the ghost realm.
translation_text.sn25.2:2.3: They can’t die without realizing the fruit of stream-entry.
translation_text.sn25.2:2.4: Someone who understands and sees these principles is called
translation_text.sn25.2:2.5: a stream-enterer, not liable to be reborn in the underworld, destined for awakening.”
